description_long: This rifle features a long, rectangular wooden stock with a smooth, dark brown finish, extending nearly the full length of the weapon. The receiver and barrel assembly are metallic, with a matte gray coloration, and the barrel is straight and unadorned, projecting from the front. The trigger guard and trigger are clearly visible beneath the receiver, and a simple iron sight is mounted on top. The rifle is mounted on a robust, angular base, suggesting it is designed for stationary use, possibly as a mounted or crew-served weapon. There are no visible external magazines, and the overall design is utilitarian, with minimal embellishments. The combination of wood and metal gives it a classic, industrial appearance suitable for urban defense or display.
description: A long, wood-stocked rifle with a matte gray metal barrel and receiver, mounted on a sturdy base. The design is simple and functional, with visible trigger and iron sight.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden stock, metallic receiver, and mounted base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel's end and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the length of the stock and the mounting base.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver and the end of the stock.
